positive: A mystical, stylized portrait of a forest spirit figure, depicted in a harmonious blend of bioluminescent flora and graceful natural elements. The spirit should have a flowing, ethereal silhouette with intricate details inspired by fern fronds, glowing moss, and delicate crystalline structures. Central composition, facing slightly to the viewer, suitable for a T-shirt print. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets detailed scientific illustration, high contrast black linework against vibrant, deep jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) and electric neon pops of light. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro with internal glow emanating from the flora, highlighting the silhouette edges. Composition: Full-body/bust shot, highly symmetrical and balanced, optimized for repeat tiling or large format print. Crisp vector quality, clean lines, ink wash aesthetic.
negative: blur, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, cropped, messy, amateur, grayscale, abstract, messy
